title: Sokki Poraandi Song Lyrics Mupparimanam
stanzas: <div>Sokki Poraandi Song Lyrics Mupparimanam

Sokki poraandi
vikki poraandi
un kannil vilundhaane
nooru tharam.

chekka sevvaanam
vetkapadum podhu
un kannathai kadanvaanga
oadi varum.

Koththodu kilaiyodu
poo pookkum vaasam pol
kaathodu un swasam
thaedi poren.

kulasaaami thiruneeru
vachchaalum silirkkaama
nee thotta anganga
silirthuporen.

un kanjaada asaivukkum
kaal kolusu nelivukkum
adi podi kodasaanji ponen

nee paakkaatha nerathil
naan unna paarthuthaan
nee parkumpodhu
ala paanji poren.

ye theekkuchi thalamela
baaratha pola en
nenjodu oru baaram
thanthaayadaa

en thookkatha palanaalum
nee vaangi pora
naan paduthaalum
kanavodu vandhaayadi

Sokki poraandi
vikki poraandi
un kannil vilundhaane
nooru tharam.

chekka sevvaanam
vetkapadum podhu
un kannathai kadanvaanga
oadi varum.

Ye panjaarathu vedakozhi pola
en nenjoram un vasam
thulluthadi
Ye panjaangathil
naal paakka solli
un kannoram
kadha pesi solluthadi

en kadhorathil
thinam patchi vandhu
thinam un pera
sollithaan koovuthadaa

ye thodum thoorathil
nee varumpodhellaam
naan vidum moochu
analaaga kolluthadi

panjaala melathaan
thee mootti poriye
ayyayyo anganga
eriyuthadi.

anjaaru muththatha
nee thandhu ponaiyina
ahhaahaa en yaekkam
anaiyumadi

Sokki poraandi
vikki poraandi
un kannil vilundhaane
nooru tharam.

chekka sevvaanam
vetkapadum podhu
un kannathai kadanvaanga
oadi varum.

Hey unkooda thaan
thinam priyaamathaan
ada naan vazha varam
ondru venumadaa

ye unmaarbil thaan
iru kanmoodi thaan
naan thoonga idam onnu
venumadaa

hey aagaasathil
oru meththa poatu
anga unkooda vilaiyaada
thonuthadi

ye aananthathil en
kaalu rendu
en pecha ketkaama
thulluthadi

kedikaaram illaama
nodineram oadaama
ingaeye ippodhe
nindraal enna.

madimeedhu naan saaya
thaayaaga nee maari
thaalaatu paatondru
sonnaal enna

Sokki poraandi
vikki poraandi
un kannil vilundhaane
nooru tharam.

chekka sevvaanam
vetkapadum podhu
un kannathai kadanvaanga
oadi varum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sokki Poraandi?

The song Sokki Poraandi expresses the feelings of love and longing, showcasing the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the plot context of the movie Mupparimanam?

Mupparimanam revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Sokki Poraandi?

The song features the talented voices of Al Rufin and Malavika Sundar.

Who composed the music for Sokki Poraandi?

The music for Sokki Poraandi was composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was Sokki Poraandi released?

Sokki Poraandi was released on February 20, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sokki Poraandi, the romantic duet unfolds a beautiful tale of love and longing, resonating with the emotions of the characters in Mupparimanam. The song's lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love. With the melodious voices of Al Rufin and Malavika Sundar, the track captures the essence of romantic moments. Overall, it is a celebration of love that leaves listeners with a smile.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sokki Poraandi from Mupparimanam is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Al Rufin and Malavika Sundar, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion. The captivating lyrics by Na Muthukumar and the vibrant composition by GV PrakashKumar make it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The light is shining, and your eyes are sparkling with a hundred colors.
When the red flower blooms, your eyes will be the ones that shine bright.
Like the fragrance of flowers in the air, I am searching for your breath.
Even if you wear sacred ash, you will still smile without hesitation.
For your sweet voice and the sound of your anklets, I have become a devotee.
When you are not looking, I see you, and when you look, I shy away.
Like a firefly in the night, my heart carries a burden with it.
No matter how heavy my sleep is, you will come to me in dreams.
The light is shining, and your eyes are sparkling with a hundred colors.
When the red flower blooms, your eyes will be the ones that shine bright.
Like a rooster crowing at dawn, my heart is restless for your presence.
In my heart, every day, your name echoes loudly.
Whenever you come near, I feel like I am losing my breath.
The fire on the roof is burning, oh, it is blazing there.
You have given me a pearl, and my heart is filled with joy.
The light is shining, and your eyes are sparkling with a hundred colors.
When the red flower blooms, your eyes will be the ones that shine bright.
Hey, is it true that you are my beloved? I need a blessing to live.
In your presence, I need a place to rest my eyes.
Hey, in the sky, there is a star, and it seems to play with you.
In this bliss, my two legs are dancing without listening to my words.
Without any trouble, I am running here and now; what will happen if I stop?
If I say I am tired, what will you do if you sing a lullaby?
The light is shining, and your eyes are sparkling with a hundred colors.
When the red flower blooms, your eyes will be the ones that shine bright.
